data.title: Join Mohawk Industries' Q4 earnings call on Feb. 13, 2026, 11am ET after release on Feb. 12, 2026 (NYSE: MHK).
data.description: Calhoun, Georgia - On January 15, 2026, Mohawk Industries (NYSE: MHK) announced their Fourth Quarter 2025 earnings release scheduled for Thursday, February 12, 2026. The conference call will be broadcast live on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 11:00 am Eastern Time.

Iran reopened its airspace after signaling a pause in executions, even as the Trump administration imposed new sanctions and continued weighing possible military strikes in response to Tehran’s violent crackdown on protests.

data.title: New Jersey American Water partners with The Watershed Institute to promote responsible winter salt use to protect waterways and wildlife.
data.description: New Jersey American Water and The Watershed Institute in Camden are calling for caution in winter salt use to safeguard water bodies and wildlife. The organizations emphasize this message as snowstorms are expected during the current season. This initiative aims to protect the local waterways from excessive salt pollution that can harm aquatic ecosystems. It is crucial for the community to be mindful of their salt usage to prevent negative impacts on the environment. The joint effort underscores the importance of responsible actions in maintaining the health of water resources.

data.title: House Democrats criticize SEC for targeting crypto firms unfairly and scrutinize Justin Sun for alleged ties to China.
data.description: House Democrats claim that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is unfairly enforcing laws against cryptocurrency companies. They specifically pointed out the case of Tron founder Justin Sun. This accusation comes as the SEC faces scrutiny for its handling of crypto-related cases. The Democrats are raising concerns about the enforcement actions taken by the SEC, alleging that certain firms are being targeted disproportionately. Justin Sun, the founder of Tron, has been highlighted in this context. The SEC's approach to regulating the crypto industry has been called into question, with critics arguing that there is a lack of consistency in enforcement. The accusations made by House Democrats against the SEC include claims of selective enforcement and bias in targeting specific individuals and companies within the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: TTEC receives Gold Award for AI-Powered Learning Innovation at Brandon Hall Technology Excellence Awards™ in the Generative AI Learning Solution category.
data.description: TTEC recently received a prestigious Gold Award at the Brandon Hall Group Technology Excellence Awards™ for the Best Advance in Generative AI Learning Solution. This recognition highlights TTEC's innovative approach in leveraging artificial intelligence for learning and development. The award signifies TTEC's commitment to driving excellence in technology, particularly in the field of AI-driven learning solutions. This achievement demonstrates TTEC's leading position in embracing cutting-edge technologies to enhance learning outcomes.

data.title: Travel Leaders Network grows with over 300 new member agencies in 2025, meeting rising demand for personalized travel support.
data.description: In 2025, Travel Leaders Network, the biggest network of professional travel agencies in North America, experienced significant growth by incorporating over 300 new member agencies. This increase highlights the growing demand for tailored support combined with substantial scale and communal resources. The organization's expansion demonstrates a trend towards personalized assistance in the travel industry, indicating a shift towards more individualized services.

data.title: Social Venture Capitalist introduces personalized financial guidance for global investors, aiming to support informed decision-making.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in London, Social Venture Capitalist unveiled its new financial market consulting and intermediary services. These services are tailored to offer personalized advice to aid in making well-informed decisions in the worldwide financial markets. The company aims to assist clients in navigating the complexities of the market by providing specialized guidance.

data.title: Correction: Beantown Media Ventures, LLC sees surge in AI clients as earned media demand grows in 2026.
data.description: Beantown Media Ventures, LLC announced a strong start to 2026 with a significant increase in AI clients as the demand for earned media rises during the generative search era. The news release, issued on Jan. 15, 2026, stated that BMV has seen a surge in AI clients, highlighting the growing interest in earned media. This update comes following changes made by the company to their initial announcement.

data.title: Uniti Group Inc. prices a $960.1 million Kinetic Fiber Securitization Notes offering, with weighted average coupon rate of 5.689%, closing on Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: Uniti Group Inc. announced that its subsidiary, Kinetic ABS Issuer LLC, priced an offering of $960,100,000 in secured fiber network revenue term notes. The offering includes $677,710,000 in 5.219% Series 2026-1, Class A-2 term notes, $112,960,000 in 5.561% Series 2026-1, Class B term notes, and $169,430,000 in 7.653% Series 2026-1, Class C term notes. These notes have an anticipated repayment date in February 2031 and a weighted average coupon rate of about 5.689%. The offering will be secured by residential fiber network assets and customer agreements in Arkansas, Georgia, Kentucky, Ohio, and Texas. The Issuer and its entities will be designated as "unrestricted subsidiaries." The closing of the offering is expected on January 30, 2026.

data.title: US hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis market set to expand at 24.5% CAGR from 2025-2034. Emerging therapies driving growth.
data.description: The hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis sector is projected to grow significantly thanks to the introduction of new treatments like plonmarlimab (TJ Biopharma), ELA026 (Electra Therapeutics), MAS825 (Novartis), tadekinig alfa (r-hIL-18BP) (AB2 Bio), and additional options. This expansion is expected to drive market growth, with these therapies catering to an increasing number of patients.

data.title: Landmark Bancorp, Inc. to discuss Q4 2025 earnings, release after market closes on Jan 28, 2026. Conference call on Jan 29, 2026 at 10 am CT.
data.description: In Manhattan, Kansas, on January 15, 2026, Landmark Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Landmark National Bank, disclosed plans to unveil its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings post-market closure on Wednesday, January 28, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 10:00 am Central Time to analyze these results. Landmark Bancorp, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LARK.

data.title: Iranian activists import Starlink systems to counter communication blackout, heighten digital resistance against authorities.
data.description: Activists meticulously planned for a communication blackout in Iran over the course of several years, clandestinely bringing in Starlink satellite internet systems and creating obstacles for the authorities to easily enforce digital shutdowns.

data.title: Lucasfilm president Kathleen Kennedy to depart, two studio veterans to take over, ending reign filled with asteroids.
data.description: After serving as president of Lucasfilm, Kathleen Kennedy will be stepping down from her position to focus on producing. The transition will see two experienced studio veterans taking over the role. This change marks a significant shift in leadership for Lucasfilm as it moves forward. Kennedy's departure raises anticipation as to how the new leadership will steer the company, known for its groundbreaking productions in the entertainment industry.

data.title: Small-cap stocks outshine large caps in 2026; Russell 2000 up 7% vs. S&P 500's 1.5%. Small-caps valued between $250M-$2B.
data.description: The Russell 2000 index started 2026 with a strong performance, hitting intraday record highs for 10 consecutive sessions as of January 15. Small-cap stocks, representing companies with market values between $250 million and $2 billion, have outperformed large caps every day during this period. This streak of outperformance hasn't been seen since June 2008. Year-to-date, the Russell 2000 is up over 7%, while the S&P 500 has only gained 1.5%. In contrast, the Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF has remained flat. The iShares Russell 2000 ETF has been the primary tracker for the small-cap benchmark. Small caps have stolen the spotlight from tech stocks, historically dominant on Wall Street. The article explores the reasons behind the small-cap rally.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $97,000 with stalled funding rate as retail traders stay sidelines. Will TradFi spark rally to $100,000?
data.description: Bitcoin struggled to maintain its price above $97,000 as its funding rate remained stagnant, causing retail traders to observe the situation. The question now is whether traditional finance (TradFi) will be the catalyst to fuel a potential surge towards $100,000.
